ga_released.name: Meta Fund: Conversions API Data Sync

methodology: Risk and confidence are computed from Jira QA gates: weighted completion across work items (Released 1.0, Pre-release 0.95, QA-passed 0.85, in QA 0.6, code review 0.4, in progress 0.25, to do 0), minus penalties for past postponements and unstaged work close to the Thursday Rollout Gate. To ship, a release must be QA-passed on staging and approved at the Thursday Rollout Gate; the Sunday Release Rundown is the final go-no-go, and the deployment team pushes it live early the following Monday morning. Jira version state maps to rollout: unreleased = in progress, released = in beta / pre-release, archived = globally released (GA).
methodology_short: Risk/confidence = weighted QA-gate completion (Released 1.0 · Pre-release 0.95 · QA-passed 0.85 · QA 0.6 · Review 0.4 · In progress 0.25 · To do 0) − penalties for postponements and unstaged work near the gate. Ship path: QA-passed on staging → Thursday Rollout Gate → Sunday Rundown go/no-go → live Monday AM. Version state: unreleased = in progress · released = beta · archived = GA.
